meta.label: Closed
meta.description: No derivation in progress. Waits for the next mission edit.

meta.label: Pending derivation
meta.description: A mission edit fired; scan changed mission elements and propose candidate hypotheses.

meta.label: Triage
meta.description: Each candidate presented: sharpen (new Hypothesis), demote (Assumption), or dismiss.
meta.waitingMessage: Mission edit produced candidate hypotheses. For each: sharpen, demote, or dismiss.
